title: Source
description: The persisted form of a registered source (design §7.6): a first-class, reach-scoped resource a workflow references by name in its sourceDescriptions. It carries the source's OpenAPI/AsyncAPI document verbatim, the reach-scoping management tags, and an audit trail; the per-environment credentials that authenticate calls to it are a separate resource (SourceCredentialBinding). Backends store this document verbatim.

name.description: The source's registered name and identity; matches the workflow sourceDescriptions entry that references it. Operator-chosen and immutable; credentials and workflows key on it.

type.description: The kind of document the source registers — an OpenAPI description for an HTTP API source, or an AsyncAPI description for a messaging source. Immutable.

document.description: The registered OpenAPI/AsyncAPI document, stored and returned verbatim. The control plane does not interpret it beyond reach scoping; clients read components.securitySchemes from it to derive credential auth (§7.5). Mutable: a re-registration rotates it.

displayName.description: An optional human-friendly display name; defaults to the name when absent. Mutable.

managementTags.description: The security tags (KVP labels) scoping who may MANAGE and SEE this source (§14.2) — e.g. tenant=acme. Immutable: set at create (the deployment stamps the creator's internal tenant tag), carried forward unchanged on update. Management reads/writes are reach-filtered by these via the caller's AccessContext. Absent on an unscoped source.

createdBy.description: The actor that registered the source.

lastUpdatedBy.description: The actor that last updated the source, if any.

lastUpdatedAt.description: When the source was last updated, if ever.

SecurityTagInfo.title: SecurityTagInfo
SecurityTagInfo.description: A security label (KVP) scoping the source for row authorization (§14.2).
